headlines.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
headlines.summary: US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of 'short and powerful' strikes on Iran, according to Axios report.

headlines.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war
headlines.summary: Remarks come after German chancellor criticised US approach to the war in Iran.

headlines.title: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
headlines.summary: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near Greek island.

headlines.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
headlines.summary: Drone users will be required to register devices and secure permits before flying them.

headlines.title: Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
headlines.summary: Blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in series of nationwide attacks.

headlines.title: IMF cuts global growth outlook to 3.1% due to Middle East war
headlines.summary: International Monetary Fund reduced growth forecast, saying world was already drifting toward more adverse scenario.

headlines.title: European oil majors' profits lifted by trading gains as Iran war upends supply chains
headlines.summary: First-quarter profits boosted by ability to shift barrels around world amid supply disruptions.

headlines.title: Iran offers to reopen Strait of Hormuz if US lifts blockade
headlines.summary: Regional officials say Iran has offered to end control over strategic strait if US lifts blockade and ends war.

headlines.title: Another Russian oil facility burns as Zelenskyy touts Ukraine's drone reach
headlines.summary: Ukrainian drone strikes continue targeting Russian oil infrastructure.

headlines.title: 10 current and former Mexican officials accused in US indictment of aiding drug trafficking
headlines.summary: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel; governor of Sinaloa hails from same party as Mexican president.
